parts.text: Hello, what can you help me with?
What's the weather like in Salem, Tamil Nadu?
வணக்கம், உங்களால் எனக்கு என்ன உதவி செய்ய முடியும்?
उत्तर प्रदेश में गेहूं का क्या भाव चल रहा है?
I have black soil in Madurai. My NPK values are N=45, P=30, K=35, and pH is 6.5. What should I plant?
Hi, I have red soil in Coimbatore. My NPK values are N=60, P=40, K=40, and pH is 6.2.
Vanakkam! Based on your red soil in Coimbatore with N=60, P=40, K=40, pH=6.2, I recommend you plant Maize, Groundnut, or Cotton. Which of these interests you?
What's the weather like there for the next 5 days?
Heavy rains flooded my farm yesterday in Salem. I have 2 acres of land and my crops are destroyed. Is there any government aid or scheme for me?
What is the price of Cotton?
I can certainly look up the wholesale mandi prices for Cotton. Could you please tell me which state you are selling in?
